reviews.comment:
Lugar sencillo bonito y buen servicio 👌🏽
Una consulta, ustedes ofrenden servicio de WesternUnion para traer efectivo?

(Translated by Google)
Nice, simple place with good service 👌🏽
One question: Do you offer Western Union service for cash transfers?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5X0xTbmpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. No me quiso cargar porque la toma del combustible de mi auto estaba del lado contrario al surtidor y no tenían ganas de estirar 2 metros la manguera. Aclaro que era el único surtidor libre que había.
Por suerte a unas cuadras había otra YPF dónde si tenían ganas de trabajar y atender bien a los clientes.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. They refused to fill my tank because my car's fuel filler neck was on the opposite side of the pump, and they didn't feel like extending the hose two meters. I should mention that it was the only open pump around.
Luckily, there was another YPF station a few blocks away where they actually wanted to work and provide good customer service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5M0xIbDJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención. Quisimos como socios hacer una consulta y todo el tiempo las oficinas cerradas. En un papel tenían un teléfono que decía trabajamos desde casa y jamás respondieron el mje.
El playero que nos cargó combustible una mala onda total.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. As members, we wanted to make an inquiry, but the offices were closed the entire time. They had a phone number on a piece of paper that said they worked from home, but they never answered our messages. The gas station attendant who filled our tank was incredibly rude.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5M0phcGZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
En temporada solo 2 surtidores, confitería cerrada, baños sucios, muy mal servicio

(Translated by Google)
During peak season only 2 pumps, confectionery closed, dirty bathrooms, very bad service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5N04tZ3NnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Falta de gasoil infinia.....solo te enterabas cuando entras a la playa ,luego de varias de cola .VERGUENZA

(Translated by Google)
Infinia diesel shortage... you only realized it when you got to the beach, after queuing for ages. Shameful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5akphTlJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Un desastre 2 surtidores para mil autos. La otra ypf del pueblo tiene 8 surtidores o mas habilitados en paralelo

(Translated by Google)
A disaster: two pumps for a thousand cars. The other YPF in town has eight or more pumps operating in parallel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5alBLeGxBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es como medio chico el lugar peor hacen buenos cafés

(Translated by Google)
It's a small place, but they make good coffee.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5OUtDcVNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Todo muy bueno. Pero tengan cuidado con el medidor de presion de los neumaticos, porque mide mal y eso hace que se carguen 10 libras de mas.

(Translated by Google)
Everything's great. But be careful with the tire pressure gauge, because it's inaccurate and can cause you to overinflate by 10 pounds.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5dTRUVVNREAE

reviews.comment:
Es difícil acceder a la estación. Pocos surtidores y el playero no se mostraba dispuesto a trabajar.

(Translated by Google)
The station is difficult to access. There are few pumps and the attendant didn't seem willing to work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5ME1ybzR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Tienen un precio en pizarra y te cobran otro en el surtidor con la excusa de no haberlo podido cambiar

(Translated by Google)
They have one price on the board and charge you another at the pump with the excuse that they couldn't change it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5Z05xTGlRRRAB
